mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.WRITER_COMPANY, B.BOARD_WRITE_DATE, B.BOARD_VIEW_COUNT, B.BOARD_CATEGORY, B.BOARD_TYPE_CODE, B.MEMBER_NO, (SELECT BOARD_NAME FROM BOARD_TYPE BT WHERE BT.BOARD_TYPE_CODE = B.BOARD_TYPE_CODE) AS BOARD_NAME FROM "BOARD" B WHERE B.BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N' AND B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT BOARD_IMG_NO, BOARD_NO, BOARD_IMG_PATH, BOARD_IMG_OG, BOARD_IMG_RE, BOARD_IMG_ORDER FROM "BOARD_IMAGE" WHERE BOARD_NO = #{value} ORDER BY BOARD_IMG_ORDER ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE "BOARD" SET BOARD_VIEW_COUNT = BOARD_VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "BOARD" ( BOARD_NO, BOARD_TYPE_CODE, MEMBER_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_CATEGORY, WRITER_COMPANY ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{boardTypeCode}, #{memberNo}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardCategory}, #{writerCompany} )

INSERT ALL
INTO "BOARD_IMAGE" ( BOARD_IMG_NO, BOARD_NO, BOARD_IMG_PATH, BOARD_IMG_OG, BOARD_IMG_RE, BOARD_IMG_ORDER ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_IMG_NO.NEXTVAL, #{img.boardNo}, #{img.boardImgPath}, #{img.boardImgOg}, #{img.boardImgRe}, #{img.boardImgOrder} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE "BOARD" SET BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, BOARD_CATEGORY = #{boardCategory}, WRITER_COMPANY = #{writerCompany}, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
